title: ErrorFrame
description: backend → TUI: a backend error surfaced to the TUI for rendering. Direction: backend → TUI. Rendered via <ErrorBanner /> or appended as a synthetic assistant message (store reducer).

message.description: Human-readable short message. MUST NOT contain KOSMOS_*-prefixed env var values (FR-004 redaction rule).

details.description: Structured error details. Any KOSMOS_* env var values MUST be redacted per #468 guard pattern.
